meta.title: Riscodex | AI Platform for Insurance Operations

hero.eyebrow: Operational Risk, Pricing and Claims Platform
hero.title: AI platform built for the insurance industry.
hero.description: Riscodex is designed to help insurance agencies and brokers run premium calculation, offer evaluation, and policy review processes faster and more reliably with AI.

live.label: 2 Active Products
live.title: TariffEQ and Versus AI
live.description: TariffEQ is in market use, and Versus AI is newly launched. The product family continues to expand.

demo.label: 10 Lines
demo.title: Broad line coverage
demo.description: From motor to fire, cargo to liability, across the core insurance lines.

modules.label: No Integration Required
modules.title: Fits your current workflow
modules.description: Works without connecting to insurer core systems.

access.label: ITU Cekirdek
access.title: Turkey-based venture
access.description: Built within one of Turkey's leading technology development programs.

applications.title: Browse the modules in a sliding card layout
applications.description: This section is the first version of a horizontal product rail designed to present the product family more fluidly on the homepage. It can be swiped on mobile and navigated with controls on desktop.

tariffeq.title: TariffEQ
tariffeq.description: An active pricing engine that compares earthquake premium outputs and alternative scenarios on a single surface.

locateloss.title: LocateLoss
locateloss.description: Brings loss and damage locations into view so field-side risk becomes part of the decision process.

foresight.title: Foresight
foresight.description: Reads early risk signals and produces decision support so teams can act faster.

firewatch.title: FireWatch
firewatch.description: Strengthens the preventive decision layer by increasing visibility into fire and operational threat signals.

claimcore.title: ClaimCore
claimcore.description: Designed to make claims processes more controlled, more readable, and more standardized.

revisor.title: Revisor
revisor.description: Simplifies revision workflows by bringing review and verification into a single decision surface.

about.title: Riscodex was founded to solve the structural problems of the insurance industry through technology.
about.description_1: Premium calculation, offer evaluation, policy control — most of these processes are still handled manually. Riscodex builds a separate AI tool for each critical step and fits into the existing workflow without requiring institutional integration.

focus.label: Technical Decision Support
focus.value: Premium validation, offer analysis, coverage comparison. Built with AI according to insurance-sector norms.

model.label: Enterprise Pilot Model
model.value: The right product is matched with the right team. After a short pilot process, the team moves into live usage.

approach.label: Full Compliance with Local Regulation
approach.value: Built on Turkish insurance regulation and sector standards. The technical and legal framework that foreign platforms cannot fully cover sits at the core of the product.

trust.title: ITU Cekirdek and reference block
trust.description: Riscodex is a Turkey-based insurance technology venture developed within ITU Cekirdek. It is used by insurance agencies and brokers. Its roots are in Turkey, and its ambition is global. Riscodex is growing to take its place internationally in insurance technology.

origin.label: Usage
origin.value: Used by insurance agencies and brokers

platform.title: A tool for each critical step. The Riscodex product family.
platform.description: Live products, pilot-access tools, and the development pipeline progress within the same operating structure.

live.title: TariffEQ
live.description: Calculate facultative earthquake premiums in full alignment with official tariff standards. Scenario comparison, automated validation, and technical decision support on one screen.

demo.title: Versus AI
demo.description: Upload multiple insurance offers; Versus AI reads the coverages, surfaces the critical differences between insurers, and produces a reasoned evaluation report. It works across Motor, Traffic, Private Health, Supplementary Health, Personal Accident, Cargo, Fire, Construction & Installation, Energy, and Liability lines.

modules.title: Versus Check
modules.description: Does the issued policy match the offer you signed? Were last year's conditions preserved this year? Versus Check reads two insurance documents side by side and reports coverage changes, limit differences, and clause revisions together with their insurance impact.

next.description: The product family advancing on a shared data model opens new use cases for adjusters and operational teams.

future.title: New Modules
future.description: New tools are being developed in risk scoring, portfolio scanning, and claims analysis.
future.footer: New modules are added to the product family in phases.

problem.title: The barriers in front of insurance operations are still structural.
problem.description: Premium calculation, offer evaluation, and policy control still rely heavily on manual processes. Each step carries error risk, and every error creates either customer loss or financial responsibility.

visibility.label: Premium Calculation
visibility.title: Manual premium calculation
visibility.description: Tariff compliance is checked manually. Technical error risk is high, and there is no systematic control mechanism.

manual.label: Offer Evaluation
manual.title: Time lost in offer evaluation
manual.description: Comparing multiple offers by coverage, deductible, and limit takes hours. That time turns directly into lost productivity.

reactive.label: Policy Review
reactive.title: Hidden losses in policy renewal
reactive.description: Coverage narrowing, limit changes, and clause differences often go unnoticed during renewal.

solutions.title: Who does Riscodex create value for?
solutions.description: Showing exactly who we serve first and then expanding into the relevant operating layer creates a stronger story.

company.title: Insurance Companies
company.description: Insurance teams that want to run pricing, tariff compliance, and risk management with more control.

broker.title: Brokers and Agencies
broker.description: Distribution teams that want to deliver faster quotes, clearer risk analysis, and a better decision basis to clients.

industrial.title: Industrial Facilities
industrial.description: Operational teams that want to read risk earlier instead of only reporting it after the fact.

company.title: Insurance Companies
company.subtitle: Make risk and pricing operations more consistent.

capital.title: Capital protection
capital.description: Make treaty-excluded risks and accumulation effects visible earlier.

compliance.title: Tariff compliance
compliance.description: Connect the official standard directly to operational flows and reduce interpretation differences.

efficiency.title: Operational efficiency
efficiency.description: Manage claims and quote turnaround with less effort.

broker.title: Brokers and Agencies
broker.subtitle: Increase sales speed while protecting technical decision quality.

comparison.title: Smart comparison
comparison.description: Make proposals easier to read and give clients a clearer decision basis.

quote.title: Fast premium estimate
quote.description: Move faster with approximate budget and price band visibility in the first conversation.

gap.title: Underinsurance analysis
gap.description: Make client coverage gaps more visible through a data-backed narrative.

industrial.title: Industrial Facilities
industrial.subtitle: An operating surface focused on reading risk before it materializes.

warning.title: Early warning visibility
warning.description: Bring field, sensor, and remote sensing data into the same decision layer.

mapping.title: Risk mapping
mapping.description: Make site-level risk profiles more visible and support better prioritization.

continuity.title: Business continuity support
continuity.description: Activate preventive decisions earlier to reduce operational downtime.

access.title: Enterprise access and engagement style
access.description: Riscodex is not a self-serve product open to the public; it is designed for controlled access and close operational setup with selected teams.

operating_model.title: We place the right tool into the right workflow.
operating_model.description: With a short assessment call, we clarify the need, start a pilot with the right product, and move into live usage together.

discovery.label: 01 — Assessment
discovery.title: Assessment
discovery.description: We review your current processes, decision points, and priorities together.

pilot.label: 02 — Pilot
pilot.title: Pilot
pilot.description: A limited but real usage area is set up with the right product.

operation.label: 03 — Live Usage
operation.title: Live Usage
operation.description: The access model and working style become clear. The team starts using the product independently.

footer_cta.title: Which product fits which process? Let's evaluate it together.
footer_cta.description: Let's define the right product and working model together. In the first meeting, we can run a live analysis using your own offer or policy files.

form.label: Business Email
form.note: After receiving your request, our team will contact you within 1 business day.
